resources.string: Are you sure you want to go back?
A connection attempt with the STB is in progress.
Your remote has to be connected through Bluetooth, please turn on your Bluetooth
is unable to pair with your app.
"Scanning feature requires camera permission. Please allow the permission at [Setting] > [Permission]"
Are you sure you want to choose different Set Top Box.
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
A digital Remote is created through Bluetooth.
Please enter pin which is displayed on TV within 30 seconds.
Able to pair and connect with device
You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save them?
"Device name can't have only special characters."
Device name Should not be empty
Not able to connect to device
We couldn’t find the device with serial number
In order to optimize your JioHome experience, your remote has to be connected through Bluetooth. Kindly grant permission to Bluetooth
Please enter JioRouter admin details below
"To reset the password, kindly factory reset AirFiber by pressing reset key for 10 seconds, After factory reset try to log in again. "
Bluetooth features on ODU are not found, Reboot ODU, your phone, Turn OFF-ON bluetooth and bluetooth tethering, disconnect any other BT device connected to Phone and try again!
Turn on Bluetooth tethering on your phone. Keep your phone nearby to the outdoor unit for strong connectivity.
CDT not available for this device
CDT Result: Device Off-Line. Power ON/Reboot
Keep changing the orientation, until you get a Good signal.
Once prompted, please connect the NVR/DVR/Switch and JioBridge to the AirFiber network via LAN to ensure the latest subnet configuration is applied.
Changing Network Setting. Please ensure phone is connected to same AirFiber network.
"Connecting to the network. Click proceed to identify best location"
You must be connected to the HomeGateway Wi-Fi to proceed. Do not proceed if you are not connected to it.
Device does not have CDT params
Device is not connected to any network
Device not connected to HomeGateway Wifi
Device will be disconnected after successful call of this, please connect again!
Device will be rebooted after successful call of this, please connect again!
"Download failed for network connection. Please click on the retry."
EID - Length is Incorrect, Please contact JPW team.
Please contact DRS for disabling the provisioning profile.
Unable to disable the test profile. Please return the device
Error during Cell ID List API. Please reboot the ODU.
Error during Cell Info API. Please reboot the ODU.
ODU device mismatch, please contact THD.
This action will end current process, would you like to continue?
"Please do not reset device without THD confirmation. This operation will disconnect the device from the application and you will need to restart from the JPW application. Do you want to continue?"
Failed to read eSIM profiles from the eSIM. Please retry after rebooting and smartphone after sometime.
Failed to read eSIM profiles from the eSIM. Please restart the journey.
%1$s successfully attached to Work Order Number: %2$s
Not able to start Firmware update due to DNS resolve failure.
"Firmware upgrade is in progress. This may take a few minutes. Kindly ensure your home gateway is Power ON"
"Please don't turn off your router while the upgrade is in progress"
Get Cell Info By Cell ID
Kindly reboot the device and retry or visit the site for local cable diagnostics. Press OK if you are at the site. Close the dialog if you are not.
This will erase/reset all your settings
"You must be connected to the Home Gateway Network before clicking any options"
"Kindly visit the site for local cable diagnostics. Press OK if you are at the site. Close the dialog if you are not."
Please connect to the internet before trying again
Device is not connected to any network
Error in Home Gateway Set IP
Router factory reset success. Please wait for 3-5 min.
Not Able to fetch firmware details. Please try again later!
If you want to change IP of home gateway, please enter it below!
* Ip Address can only contain digits.
* Ip Address subnet must be between 0-254 characters.
* Ip Address subnet length must be between 1-3 characters.
* Ip Address must not contain any spaces
Lan IPv4 should be valid private address:
Unable to reserve ips. Please ensure proper connectivity with home gateway & try again later.
Unable to delete ips. Please ensure proper connectivity with home gateway & try again later.
Unable to fetch reserve ips. Please ensure proper connectivity with home gateway & home gateway latest firmware updated before trying again later.
Unable to set ping. Please ensure proper entered IP & connectivity with home gateway & try again later.
Please check your internet connection to fetch latest firmware details
Device not connected to Home Gateway Wifi
Please connect to the Home Gateway Wifi before trying again
Please connect devices to the AirFiber connection to proceed.
Please connect to home gateway wifi
Please connect your device with home gateway wifi and try again.
Unable to fetch plume device details. Please ensure proper internet with home gateway & try again.
Not able to fetch customer details. Please ensure proper internet & entered serial number and try again later.
Unable to fetch plume authentication details. Please ensure proper internet and try again later.
Plume login authentication failed. Please ensure proper internet and try again later.
Router reboot success. Please wait for 3-5 min.
Please select some devices from the list.
Home Gateway connected device IP subnet mismatch. Please try again later.
Please enter ip address of the client devices to trigger Ping
This device is already DHCP reserved. Are you sure you want to delete?
Updating IP Address of Home Gateway
If you cannot find your devices on this list, kindly reboot the devices and ensure LAN is connected. Please pull down to refresh list.
If you want to proceed, please click the below button!
Incorrect Home Gateway WiFi is connected. Please ensure proper connectivity with WiFi of which RSN you scanned.
To setup JioAirFiber, Let’s activate Outdoor unit.
You have scanned an %1$s, which is currently not supported.
Excepted device was ODU but received an unknown device
Please install Jio Secure App before Clicking SetUp Completed.
ICCIDs not matching. Please contact THD.
Unable to download the required profile
%1$s is missing or empty. Please contact JPW team.
Clear cache of JPW and JioHome app and restart the process.
Failed to read eSIM on the device, please contact THD.
Please contact DRS for removal of provisioning profiles.
Account name and password should not be empty
"Connected to the network. Click proceed to identify best location."
Device has no profiles downloaded, download feature unavailable.
If you want to change IP of ONT Device, please click the below button!
IP Address already exists in other devices. Try Again!
Please remove some devices from the list.
Please set ip address for this device
Outdoor unit is not active. Please proceed with the activation process.
* Password can only contain alphanumeric characters.
* Password must not contain any spaces
Permissions not granted by the user.
Please connect NVR/DVR/Switch and JioBridge LAN with IDU/ONT
Please connect to the HomeGateway Wifi before trying again
Please connect to the internet before trying again
Please enable location to search nearby devices!
Please ensure you are connected to the IDU Wi-Fi
Please go to settings, enable Bluetooth, Bluetooth tethering, and try the journey again!
Please make sure the LAN connection of the NVR/DVR/Switch and JioBridge is disconnected from IDU/ONT
Please Power OFF the ODU, wait for 10 seconds, Power it ON, and try again!
Please power-on/reboot the device or report the issue.
Please reboot ODU and smart phone, check your internet connectivity and start the journey again!
Please Reboot ODU, your phone, Turn OFF-ON bluetooth and bluetooth tethering , disconnect any other BT device connected to Phone and try again!
Please try again, make sure to accept the BT pairing request!
Power ON the scanned ODU, stay near by and try again!
Profile is still not enabled, try again!
"This operation will disconnect the device from the application and you will need to restart from the JPW application. Do you want to continue?"
Reboot the scanned ODU. Restart Bluetooth and BT Tethering of your mobile, stay near by the device and try again!
Reboot ODU and smart phone and then restart the journey again!
Profile Enable/Install Feature Unavailable for Repair Functionality
Reset Your Password Using Reset Key
Current location has Average signal, we recommend to change the Outdoor unit orientation to ensure maximum 5G signal.
Current location is good for Outdoor unit installation
Current location has Poor signal, we recommend to change the Outdoor unit orientation to ensure maximum 5G signal.
Router reboot success. Please wait for 3-5 min.
Setup is completed successfully, please go back to JPW app!
All the existing WiFi connections will get disconnected and you need to connect it again to WiFi. After factory reset use WiFi name and the password which is written at the back of AirFiber Device.
"Your Outdoor unit is active, kindly Orientate it to get Good RF value."
“Continue setup” will turn off Bluetooth of connected device.
GPS is not enabled. Kindly turn on GPS to proceed with firmware update.
Location Permission Not Granted. Please provide location permission to proceed with firmware update
Unable to attach %1$s to Work Order Number: %2$s
Unable to connect to the device for internet sharing, please try again!
Unable to perform Bluetooth operations, Reboot ODU, your phone, Turn OFF-ON bluetooth and bluetooth tethering, disconnect any other BT device connected to Phone and try again!
This website is unsafe to proceed, would you like to continue?
Your current firmware is not up to date. to proceed with camera ip reservation, kindly update the home gateway firmware.
Your firmware is already up to date !!
None of the files exists to add to zip, try again
Are you sure you want to exit from setup process
Where can I find the QR code?
Open settings on your Jio STB, go to Remote & Accessories section and you’ll find the QR code in JioHome Setup
The STB firmware version does not match the required version. Please replace the box.
Please allow camera permission to scan Jio WiFi device QR code
"Device is Rooted. Unfortunately, we don't work too well with that."
Download failed! Please delete %1$s file from Documents/Firmware Folder
"Your User Session has Expired! Please reLogin! Alert! You will be redirected to JFE Login Screen!"
Unable to fetch Force Update response
Device not connected to Home Gateway Wifi
Please connect to the Home Gateway Wifi before trying again
You have scanned an %1$s, which is currently not supported.
Excepted device was ODU but received an unknown device

"Hi
Please let us know details about the issue you observed"
Currently we are allowing only esim installation and jio secure camera installation.
CDT not available for this device
CDT not available for this RMDU
* RSN must not contain any spaces
* RSN can only contain alphanumeric characters.
Please scan again with valid QR code!
Please properly scan the QR code of IDU or ONT
Please properly enter the RSN of IDU or ONT
Unable to scan Device QR code without access to camera. Please allow camera permissions at [Setting] > [Permissions] screen
Internal server error, can be retired after some time.
Not acceptable, maximum concurrent session reached.
Are you sure you want to logout?
Unauthorized, Invalid or expired JWT/tokenIdentifier mismatch.
By requesting OTP you agree to the Terms & Conditions" & "
No Internet connection. Please connect to your WiFi network and try again.
Not Found, No session found for given tokenIdentifier.
No such ONTs available for now!
Device not connected to Jio Fiber Wifi before trying again
Device not connected to Jio Fiber Wifi
%1$s should not be empty and should be 12 characters long
Please check your internet connection and try again!
Please scan the QR code of IDU or ONT
May be your Private DNS is not OFF. Please follow below steps to turn off Private DNS
Unknown/Invalid module from JPW. Please contact JPW Team.
Location Permission Not Granted. In order to use this feature properly, location permission is required
SKU %1$s is now added to list
Are you sure you want to log out from the JioHome app?
By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy & Legal Policy
By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy & Legal Policy
GPS is not enabled. Kindly turn on GPS to proceed with firmware update.
Location Permission Not Granted. Please enable location permission manually
Incorrect Device Scanned. Please scan an ODU device.
Incorrect Device Scanned. Please scan a STB device.
When \"Pairing Request\" is displayed on TV. Please select \"Pair\" option on TV and press OK button on physical remote.
When “Pairing PIN” is displayed on TV. Please insert the same and select pair option on remote.
Please make sure your mobile device and Jio Set Top Box are placed close to each other for a successful connection.
Your mobile phone and Jio Set Top Box should be within 5 FT distance to connect with each other
Barcode scanning library for Android, using ZXing for decoding.
"This feature requires microphone access. Please allow the permission at [Setting] > [Permission]"
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Make sure your devices are turned on & in pairing mode.
Press the pair button to connect with your Jio STB.
Pairing request has been cancelled from STB.
The STB RSN is not matching with %1$s. Please replace the box
RSN not available. Please Provide the rsn
All permissions are granted and bluetooth is enabled. Scanning started.
Please ensure the device with serial number %1$s is powered on.
Product type configuration failed. Replace the STB to proceed.
Do you want to cancel the current connection and exit?
Bluetooth connection is required to optimize your experience. Please check your Bluetooth connection.
The JFE app is not able to connect with STB
This will unpair the remote from the device. Would you like to proceed?
Update to the latest STB firmware for improved performance, new features, and enhanced stability
You are now in Developer mode!
Sorry, the Android camera encountered a problem. You may need to restart the device.
Place a barcode inside the viewfinder rectangle to scan it.
